tasks.title: Get the screener working
tasks.description: Get the TTE Screener Pine Script indicator fully operational with additional symbols and optimized indicator integrations

subtasks.title: Increase 5 symbols to 10 symbols in the screener
subtasks.description: Modify the TTE Screener to support 10 symbols instead of the current 5 symbols limit

subtasks.title: Optimize OB & FVG indicator for TTE Screener
subtasks.description: Optimize the OB & FVG.txt indicator so that it can run efficiently within the TTE Screener

subtasks.title: Optimize Nadaraya Watson Envelope for TTE Screener
subtasks.description: Optimize the Nadaraya Watson Envelope.txt indicator so that it can run efficiently within the TTE Screener

subtasks.title: Optimize Kernel AO Divergence for TTE Screener
subtasks.description: Optimize the Kernel AO Divergence.txt indicator for the TTE Screener. Only Logic 1 and Logic 2 regular divergences need to be optimized and integrated

subtasks.title: Optimize Multi Oscillator Swing High Low for TTE Screener
subtasks.description: Optimize the Multi Oscillator_swing high low.txt indicator for the TTE Screener. Only the Same Side regular divergence needs to be optimized and run efficiently
